title: cnicus palustris
intro: Cnicus palustris, also known as bull thistle, is a biennial or perennial plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cnicus palustris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cnicus palustris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
